name: Multiple Unclean Threats Detected on Same Host (by Source Address)
notes:
This rule triggers when multiple threats have been detected on the same host where the antivirus action taken is neither clean or quarantine.

Note: This rule should be tuned to reflect the acceptable antivirus actions.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices
when the event matches Action (custom) is not N/A, Threat Name (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches LOWER("Action") not in ('clean', 'cleaned', 'quarantine', 'quarantined') AQL filter query
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address in 5 minutes
when an event matches any of the following Multiple Unclean Threats Detected on Same Host (by Machine Identifier)
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Unclean Threats Detected on Same Host (by Source Address) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices
AND when the event matches Action (custom) is not N/A, Threat Name (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches LOWER("Action") not in ('clean', 'cleaned', 'quarantine', 'quarantined') AQL filter query
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address in 5 minutes
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Multiple Unclean Threats Detected on Same Host (by Machine Identifier)
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Unclean Threats Detected on Same Host (by Source Address)
Event description: Detects when multiple threats have been detected on the same host where the antivirus action taken is neither clean or quarantine.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
